label: State and local tax deduction
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss for itemized state and local tax deduction.

label: Medical expense deduction
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss for itemized medical expense deduction.

label: Charitable contribution deduction
jct_line_label: Charitable contributions, other than education and health; charitable contributions, education; charitable contributions, health
definition_note: Sum of individual income tax revenue-loss rows for charitable contributions excluding corporate income tax estimates.

label: Deductible mortgage interest
jct_line_label: Deductibility of mortgage interest on owner-occupied homes
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss for deductible mortgage interest on owner-occupied homes.

label: Qualified business income deduction
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss for qualified business income deduction.

label: Self-employed health insurance deduction
jct_line_label: Deduction for health insurance premiums and long-term care insurance premiums by the self-employed
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss FY2024; JCT line includes long-term care insurance premiums deducted by the self-employed.

label: Health savings account deduction
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss FY2024; JCT footnote 14: includes employer contributions made through cafeteria plans, which also appear in other line items.

label: Student loan interest deduction
jct_line_label: Deduction for interest on student loans
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss FY2024.

label: Self-employed pension (Keogh) net exclusion
jct_line_label: Net exclusion of pension contributions and earnings: plans covering partners and sole proprietors (sometimes referred to as Keogh plans)
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss FY2024; JCT measures the NET EXCLUSION of contributions and earnings (inside buildup), broader than the above-the-line contribution deduction alone - broad-fit anchor only.

label: Traditional IRA net exclusion
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss FY2024; JCT measures the net exclusion of contributions and earnings, broader than the contribution deduction alone - broad-fit anchor only.

label: CDCC and employer child care exclusion
jct_line_label: Credit for child and dependent care and exclusion of employer-provided child care
definition_note: Individual income tax revenue loss FY2024; COMBINED line: the credit plus the employer-provided child care exclusion (JCT footnote 11 includes dependent care FSA purchases); not a clean CDCC-only concept.
